note_text: Wound healing well. No signs of infection. Antibiotics not required.
Purulent discharge noted at incision site. Wound erythema and tenderness.
Query early wound breakdown. Possible dehiscence at medial aspect.
Joint aspiration: culture positive Staph aureus. Periprosthetic infection.
8 months post knee replacement. Infected synovial fluid on aspiration.
Satisfactory recovery. Wound clean and dry. No concerns.
